mapper.sql: ( CASE WHEN (SELECT CDCATE3 FROM ${userData.schema}.MCODEM WHERE COMCDKY = 'ITEMCOD' AND COMCDVL = #{param.itemcod}) = 'PLATE' THEN ( SELECT BA.ADDCOKY FROM ${userData.schema}.BADDCO BA WHERE ((BA.MINLENG = 0 OR BA.MINLENG <= #{param.skuleng}) AND (BA.MAXLENG = 0 OR #{param.skuleng} < BA.MAXLENG)) AND ( CASE WHEN (SELECT ORWIDYN FROM ${userData.schema}.BTRCAT WHERE BTRCATE = #{param.btrcate}) = 'Y' THEN (BA.MINWIDT = 0 OR BA.MINWIDT <= #{param.grosswd}) AND (BA.MAXWIDT = 0 OR #{param.grosswd} < BA.MAXWIDT) OR (BA.MAXLENG = 0 AND BA.MINLENG <= #{param.skuleng}) OR (BA.MAXWIDT = 0 AND BA.MINWIDT <= #{param.grosswd}) ELSE (BA.MINWIDT = 0 OR BA.MINWIDT <= #{param.skuwidt}) AND (BA.MAXWIDT = 0 OR #{param.skuwidt} < BA.MAXWIDT) OR (BA.MAXLENG = 0 AND BA.MINLENG <= #{param.skuleng}) OR (BA.MAXWIDT = 0 AND BA.MINWIDT <= #{param.skuwidt}) END ) AND BA.SYSCDYN = 'N' ) ELSE ( SELECT BAD.ADDCOKY FROM ${userData.schema}.BADDCO BAD WHERE BAD.SYSCDYN = 'Y' ) END )

(SELECT MG.SKUGRKY FROM ${userData.schema}.MGRPMA MG WHERE ((MG.MINLENG = 0 OR MG.MINLENG <= #{param.skuleng}) AND (MG.MAXLENG = 0 OR #{param.skuleng} < MG.MAXLENG)) AND((MG.MINWIDT = 0 OR MG.MINWIDT <= #{param.skuwidt}) AND (MG.MAXWIDT = 0 OR #{param.skuwidt} < MG.MAXWIDT)) AND MG.GRUSEYN = 'Y')
mapper.select: /* getDoe035Layer */ SELECT IFNULL( (SELECT MAX(CASE WHEN LOLAYER IS NULL OR LOLAYER = 0 OR LOLAYER = '' THEN 0 ELSE LOLAYER END) FROM ${userData.schema}.WSTKKY WHERE WAREKEY = #{param.warekey} AND AREAKEY = #{param.areakey} AND LOCAKEY = #{param.locakey} LIMIT 1), 0) AS LOLAYER
/* selectTaskoky */ select ${userData.schema}.fn_sm_taskoky() as taskoky from dual
/* selectTaskoit */ select ${userData.schema}.fn_sm_taskoit(#{taskoky}) as taskoit from dual
mapper.update: UPDATE ${userData.schema}.WSTKKY SET TASKQTY = #{param.stotqty}, TASKOKY = #{param.taskoky}, TASKOIT = #{param.taskoit}, LMODATE = date_format(now(), '%Y%m%d'), LMOTIME = date_format(now(), '%H%i%s'), LMOUSER = #{userData.useract}, UPDTCHK = #{param.updtchk} + 1 WHERE WAREKEY = #{param.warekey} AND STOCKKY = #{param.stockky} AND UPDTCHK = #{param.updtchk}

UPDATE ${userData.schema}.WTAKIT SET TASKSTS = #{param.tasksts}, MVSTDAT = date_format(now(), '%Y%m%d'), MVSTTIM = date_format(now(), '%H%i%s'), LMODATE = date_format(now(), '%Y%m%d'), LMOTIME = date_format(now(), '%H%i%s'), LMOUSER = #{userData.useract}, UPDTCHK = UPDTCHK + 1 WHERE WAREKEY = #{param.warekey} AND TASKOKY = #{param.taskoky} AND TASKOIT = #{param.taskoit}
mapper.select: SELECT CONCAT(WS.STOCKKY, WS.WAREKEY) as ROWKEY , WS.STOCKKY, WS.WAREKEY , WS.AREAKEY ,WS.LOCAKEY, WS.LOLAYER , WS.LOTNMKY, WS.OWNERKY , WS.CUSTCOD, WS.SKUMKEY, WS.SKUDESC , WS.SKUWEIG, WS.SKUWIDT, WS.SKULENG, WS.SKUTHIC , WS.STLOTNB, WS.PURCNUM, WS.ORDERLN , WS.DEORGNM, WS.DEMODNM , WS.ITEMCOD, WS.STOTQTY, WS.SALLQTY, WS.SBLOQTY , WS.SUOMKEY, WS.RCVDCDT, WS.LOTAT01, WS.LOTAT02 , WS.LOTAT03, WS.STKSTAT , WS.BLOCKID, WS.RCVDCKY , WS.RCVDCIT, WS.ADJSOKY, WS.ADJSOIT, WS.PHYSOKY , WS.PHYSOIT, WS.SHPDCKY, WS.SHPDCIT, WS.TASKOKY , WS.TASKOIT, WS.CREDATE, WS.CRETIME, WS.CREUSER , WS.LMODATE, WS.LMOTIME, WS.LMOUSER, WS.UPDTCHK FROM ${userData.schema}.WSTKKY WS WHERE WS.WAREKEY = #{param.warekey} AND WS.STOTQTY > 0 AND WS.AREAKEY = #{param.toareky} AND WS.LOCAKEY = #{param.tolocky} AND WS.LOLAYER = #{param.tolayer}

/* getSelectionBeforeLocaList */ SELECT WT.TASKOKY, WS.SKUMKEY, WS.AREAKEY as FRAREKY, WS.LOCAKEY as FRLOCKY, WS.LOLAYER as FRLAYER FROM ${userData.schema}.WTAKIT WT INNER JOIN ${userData.schema}.WSTKKY WS ON WS.TASKOKY = WT.TASKOKY AND WS.TASKOIT = WT.TASKOIT AND WS.SKUMKEY = WT.SKUMKEY WHERE WT.TASKOKY = #{param.taskoky}
mapper.update: /* updateSelectionBeforeLoca */ UPDATE ${userData.schema}.WTAKIT SET FRAREKY = #{param.frareky}, FRLOCKY = #{param.frlocky}, FRLAYER = #{param.frlayer}, LMODATE = date_format(now(), '%Y%m%d'), LMOTIME = date_format(now(), '%H%i%s'), LMOUSER = #{userData.useract}, UPDTCHK = UPDTCHK + 1 WHERE TASKOKY = #{param.taskoky} AND SKUMKEY = #{param.skumkey}

/* updateDoe036WtakitOperStart */ UPDATE ${userData.schema}.WTAKIT SET TASKSTS = #{param.tasksts}, MVSTDAT = date_format(now(), '%Y%m%d'), MVSTTIM = date_format(now(), '%H%i%s'), LMODATE = date_format(now(), '%Y%m%d'), LMOTIME = date_format(now(), '%H%i%s'), LMOUSER = #{userData.useract}, UPDTCHK = UPDTCHK + 1 WHERE WAREKEY = #{param.warekey} AND TASKOKY = #{param.taskoky}
mapper.select: /* "getDoe036WtakitList" */ SELECT CONCAT(WT.TASKOKY, WT.TASKOIT) as ROWKEY , WT.TASKOKY, WT.TASKOIT , WT.WAREKEY , DATE_FORMAT(WT.TASKDAT,'%Y-%m-%d') as TASKDAT , WT.DOCCATE, WT.DOCTYPE , WT.TASKSTS, WT.LOTNMKY , WT.OWNERKY, WT.CUSTCOD , WT.SKUMKEY, WT.SKUDESC , WT.FRAREKY, WT.FRLOCKY, WT.FRLAYER , WT.TOAREKY, WT.TOLOCKY, WT.TOLAYER , WT.FORDQTY, WT.TCMPQTY, WT.ALLGRKY , WT.MVSTDAT, WT.MVSTTIM , WT.MVEDDAT, WT.MVEDTIM , WT.PARSNCD, WT.PARSNNM , WT.PKRSNCD, WT.PKRSNNM , WT.STOCKKY , WT.EOASNKY, WT.EOASNIT , WT.COSTRKY, WT.COSTRIT , WT.RCVDCKY, WT.RCVDCIT , WT.OUTBOKY, WT.OUTBOIT , WT.SHPDCKY, WT.SHPDCIT , DATE_FORMAT( WT.CREDATE,'%Y-%m-%d') as CREDATE , DATE_FORMAT(STR_TO_DATE(WT.CRETIME,'%H%i%s'),'%H:%i:%s') AS CRETIME , ${userData.schema}.FN_SY_USERNAM(WT.CREUSER) AS CREUSER , DATE_FORMAT(WT.LMODATE,'%Y-%m-%d') as LMODATE , DATE_FORMAT(STR_TO_DATE(WT.LMOTIME,'%H%i%s'),'%H:%i:%s') AS LMOTIME , ${userData.schema}.FN_SY_USERNAM(WT.LMOUSER) AS LMOUSER , WT.UPDTCHK FROM ${userData.schema}.WTAKIT WT WHERE WT.WAREKEY = #{param.warekey} AND WT.TASKOKY = #{param.taskoky}
mapper.update: /* updateDoe037Wstkky */ UPDATE ${userData.schema}.WSTKKY SET TASKQTY = 0, AREAKEY = #{param.toareky}, LOCAKEY = #{param.tolocky}, LOLAYER = #{param.tolayer}, LMODATE = date_format(now(), '%Y%m%d'), LMOTIME = date_format(now(), '%H%i%s'), LMOUSER = #{userData.useract}, UPDTCHK = #{param.tmpupck} + 1 WHERE WAREKEY = #{param.warekey} AND STOCKKY = #{param.stockky} AND UPDTCHK = #{param.tmpupck}
mapper.select: /* selectPhysoky */ select ${userData.schema}.fn_sm_physoky() as physoky from dual
/* selectPhysoit */ select ${userData.schema}.fn_sm_physoit(#{param.physoky}) as physoit from dual
/* selectPhygrky */ select ${userData.schema}.fn_sm_phygrky() as phygrky from dual

/* getBeforeAfterData */ SELECT PHYSOKY, PHYSOIT, WAREKEY , DOCCATE, DOCTYPE , PHYNAME, PHYSTAT, PHYMODE, PHYGRKY , STOCKKY, LOTNMKY, RMSTKYN , AREAKEY, LOCAKEY, STLAYER , CUSTCOD, CUSTNAM, OWNERKY, OWNRNAM , PARSNCD, PARSNNM , SKUMKEY, SKUDESC, SUOMKEY , SYSTQTY, PHYSQTY, COMPQTY , CREDATE, CRETIME, CREUSER , LMODATE, LMOTIME, LMOUSER, UPDTCHK FROM ${userData.schema}.WPHYIT WHERE WAREKEY = #{param.warekey} AND PHYSOKY = #{param.physoky} AND STOCKKY = #{param.stockky} AND PHYGRKY = #{param.phygrky}

/* doe040HasStock */ SELECT WS.STOCKKY, WS.WAREKEY , WS.AREAKEY, WS.LOCAKEY , WS.LOLAYER, WS.LOTNMKY, WS.OWNERKY , WS.CUSTCOD, WS.SKUMKEY, WS.SKUDESC , WS.SKUWEIG, WS.SKUWIDT, WS.SKULENG, WS.SKUTHIC , WS.STLOTNB, WS.PURCNUM, WS.ORDERLN , WS.REGIKEY, WS.DESTKEY , WS.ITEMCOD, WS.STOTQTY, WS.SALLQTY, WS.SBLOQTY , WS.SUOMKEY, WS.RCVDCDT, WS.LOTAT01, WS.LOTAT02 , WS.LOTAT03, WS.STKSTAT, WS.BLOCKID, WS.RCVDCKY , WS.RCVDCIT, WS.ADJSOKY, WS.ADJSOIT, WS.PHYSOKY , WS.PHYSOIT, WS.SHPDCKY, WS.SHPDCIT, WS.TASKOKY , WS.TASKOIT, WS.CREDATE, WS.CRETIME, WS.CREUSER , WS.LMODATE, WS.LMOTIME, WS.LMOUSER, WS.UPDTCHK FROM ${userData.schema}.WSTKKY WS INNER JOIN ${userData.schema}.WPHYIT WP ON WP.WAREKEY = WS.WAREKEY AND WP.PHYSOKY = WS.PHYSOKY AND WP.PHYSOIT = WS.PHYSOIT AND WP.STOCKKY = WS.STOCKKY AND WP.SKUMKEY = WS.SKUMKEY WHERE WS.WAREKEY = #{param.warekey} AND WS.STOCKKY = #{param.stockky} AND WS.SKUMKEY = #{param.skumkey} AND WP.PHYMODE = #{param.phymode}

/* getSamePlaceStock */ SELECT WS.STOCKKY, WS.WAREKEY , WS.AREAKEY ,WS.LOCAKEY, WS.LOLAYER , WS.LOTNMKY, WS.OWNERKY , WS.CUSTCOD, WS.SKUMKEY, WS.SKUDESC , WS.SKUWEIG, WS.SKUWIDT, WS.SKULENG, WS.SKUTHIC , WS.STLOTNB, WS.PURCNUM, WS.ORDERLN , WS.REGIKEY, WS.DESTKEY , WS.ITEMCOD, WS.STOTQTY, WS.SALLQTY, WS.SBLOQTY , WS.SUOMKEY, WS.RCVDCDT, WS.LOTAT01, WS.LOTAT02 , WS.LOTAT03, WS.STKSTAT , WS.BLOCKID, WS.RCVDCKY , WS.RCVDCIT, WS.ADJSOKY, WS.ADJSOIT, WS.PHYSOKY , WS.PHYSOIT, WS.SHPDCKY, WS.SHPDCIT, WS.TASKOKY , WS.TASKOIT, WS.CREDATE, WS.CRETIME, WS.CREUSER , WS.LMODATE, WS.LMOTIME, WS.LMOUSER, WS.UPDTCHK FROM ${userData.schema}.WSTKKY WS WHERE WS.WAREKEY = #{param.warekey} AND WS.STOTQTY > 0
AND WS.AREAKEY = #{param.areakey} AND WS.LOCAKEY = #{param.locakey} AND WS.LOLAYER >= #{param.stlayer} GROUP BY WS.LOLAYER
mapper.update:
/* updateDoe040Wstkky */ UPDATE ${userData.schema}.WSTKKY SET TASKQTY = 0, AREAKEY = #{param.areakey}, LOCAKEY = #{param.locakey}, LOLAYER = #{param.stlayer}, BTRCATE = #{param.btrcate}, SKUGRKY = , ADDCOKY = , SKUWEIG = #{param.skuweig}, SKUWIDT = #{param.skuwidt}, SKULENG = #{param.skuleng}, SKUTHIC = #{param.skuthic},
LMODATE = date_format(now(), '%Y%m%d'), LMOTIME = date_format(now(), '%H%i%s'), LMOUSER = #{userData.useract}, UPDTCHK = UPDTCHK + 1 WHERE WAREKEY = #{param.warekey} AND STOCKKY = #{param.stockky}
mapper.select:
/* getSkuInfo */ SELECT WAREKEY, OWNERKY, SKUMKEY, SKUGRKY , SKUDESC, ITEMCOD, SKUWEIG, SKUWIDT , SKULENG, SKUTHIC, SUOMKEY, SKUSTAT , CREDATE, CRETIME, CREUSER, LMODATE , LMOTIME, LMOUSER, UPDTCHK FROM ${userData.schema}.MSKUWC WHERE WAREKEY = #{param.warekey}
AND SKUMKEY = #{param.skumkey}
mapper.update: /* updateDoe040Mskuwc */ UPDATE ${userData.schema}.MSKUWC SET SKUWEIG = #{param.skuweig}, SKUWIDT = #{param.skuwidt}, SKULENG = #{param.skuleng}, SKUTHIC = #{param.skuthic}, SKUGRKY = , LMODATE = date_format(now(), '%Y%m%d'), LMOTIME = date_format(now(), '%H%i%s'), LMOUSER = #{userData.useract}, UPDTCHK = #{param.tmpupck} + 1 WHERE WAREKEY = #{param.warekey} AND SKUMKEY = #{param.skumkey} AND UPDTCHK = #{param.tmpupck}
mapper.select: /* getWpyitApi */ SELECT PHYSOKY, PHYSOIT , WAREKEY, DOCCATE, DOCTYPE , PHYNAME, PHYSTAT, PHYMODE, PHYGRKY , STOCKKY, LOTNMKY, AREAKEY, LOCAKEY, STLAYER , CUSTCOD, OWNERKY, PARSNCD, PARSNNM, RMSTKYN , BTRCATE, SKUGRKY, SKUMKEY, SKUDESC , SKUWEIG, SKUWIDT, SKULENG, SKUTHIC , SUOMKEY, ADDCOKY, SYSTQTY, PHYSQTY, COMPQTY , DATE_FORMAT(now(), '%y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') as PHYDTTM , CREDATE, CRETIME, CREUSER, LMODATE, LMOTIME, LMOUSER, UPDTCHK FROM ${userData.schema}.WPHYIT WHERE WAREKEY = #{param.warekey} AND PHYSOKY = #{param.physoky} AND PHYMODE = 'AFTER'
/* selectAdjsoky */ select ${userData.schema}.fn_sm_adjsoky() as adjsoky from dual
/* selectAdjsoit */ select ${userData.schema}.fn_sm_adjsoit(#{param.adjsoky}) as adjsoit from dual
/* selectAdjgrky */ select ${userData.schema}.fn_sm_adjgrky() as adjgrky from dual

SELECT ADJSOKY, ADJSOIT , WAREKEY, DOCCATE, DOCTYPE , ADJDCST, ADJITST , ADJMODE, ADJGRKY , PARSNCD, ADJSRMK , STOCKKY, AREAKEY, LOCAKEY, LOLAYER , LOTNMKY, STLOTNB, CUSTCOD, CUSTNAM , OWNERKY, OWNRNAM , SKUGRKY, SKUMKEY , SKUDESC, SKUWEIG, SKUWIDT, SKULENG, SKUTHIC , PURCNUM, ORDERLN, EMSKUYN, STKMEMO , REGIORG, DESTORG, DEORGNM , REGIMOD, DESTMOD, DEMODNM , ITEMCOD, STOTQTY, SALLQTY, SBLOQTY , SUOMKEY, ADDCOKY, RCVDCDT , LOTAT01, LOTAT02, LOTAT03 , STKSTAT, BLOCKID , RCVDCKY, RCVDCIT, PHYSOKY, PHYSOIT, SHPDCKY, SHPDCIT, TASKOKY, TASKOIT , CREDATE, CRETIME, CREUSER, LMODATE, LMOTIME, LMOUSER, UPDTCHK FROM ${userData.schema}.WADJIT WHERE WAREKEY = #{param.warekey} AND ADJSOKY = #{param.adjsoky} AND ADJMODE = 'AFTER'
mapper.update: /* updateDoe041Wstkky */ UPDATE ${userData.schema}.WSTKKY SET SKUWEIG = #{param.skuweig}, SKUWIDT = #{param.skuwidt}, SKULENG = #{param.skuleng}, SKUTHIC = #{param.skuthic}, REGIMOD = #{param.regimod}, DESTMOD = #{param.destmod}, SKUGRKY = , ADDCOKY = , STKSTAT = #{param.stkstat}, EMSKUYN = #{param.emskuyn}, STKMEMO = #{param.stkmemo}, ADJSOKY = #{param.adjsoky}, ADJSOIT = #{param.adjsoit}, CUSTCOD = IFNULL(#{param.custcod},''), CUSTNAM = #{param.custnam}, OWNERKY = IFNULL(#{param.ownerky},''), OWNRNAM = #{param.ownrnam}, LMODATE = date_format(now(), '%Y%m%d'), LMOTIME = date_format(now(), '%H%i%s'), LMOUSER = #{userData.useract}, UPDTCHK = #{param.updtchk} + 1 WHERE WAREKEY = #{param.warekey} AND STOCKKY = #{param.stockky} AND AREAKEY = #{param.areakey} AND LOCAKEY = #{param.locakey} AND LOLAYER = #{param.lolayer} AND SKUMKEY = #{param.skumkey} AND UPDTCHK = #{param.updtchk}
mapper.select:
/* getDoe041Denamlc */ SELECT MDE.DESTKEY AS DESTKEY, MDE.DENAMLC , MDE.DEMANNM, MDE.DEPOSCD, MDE.DESADDR, MDE.DESTELN FROM ${userData.schema}.MDESMA MDE WHERE MDE.DEUSEYN = 'Y'
AND MDE.DENAMLC LIKE CONCAT('%',#{param.denamlc},'%')
mapper.update: /* updateStockAllocate */ UPDATE ${userData.schema}.WSTKKY SET SALLQTY = 1, PLANQTY = 1, PLCMQTY = 1, LMODATE = DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%Y%m%d'), LMOTIME = DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%H%i%s'), LMOUSER = #{userData.useract}, UPDTCHK = #{param.updtchk} + 1 WHERE STOCKKY = #{param.stockky} AND WAREKEY = #{param.warekey} AND UPDTCHK = #{param.updtchk}
mapper.insert:
/* insertMskuwcForPhysical */ INSERT INTO ${userData.schema}.MSKUWC(
SKUMKEY,
WAREKEY, OWNERKY, SKUGRKY, ADDCOKY, SKUDESC, ITEMCOD, SKUWEIG, SKUWIDT, SKULENG, SKUTHIC, SUOMKEY, SKUSTAT,
CREDATE, CRETIME, CREUSER, LMODATE, LMOTIME, LMOUSER ) VALUES(
#{param.skumkey},
#{param.warekey}, #{param.ownerky}, #{param.skugrky}, #{param.addcoky}, #{param.skudesc}, #{param.itemcod}, #{param.skuweig}, #{param.skuwidt}, #{param.skuleng}, #{param.skuthic}, #{param.suomkey}, #{param.skustat},
date_format(now(), '%Y%m%d'), date_format(now(), '%H%i%s'), #{userData.useract}, date_format(now(), '%Y%m%d'), date_format(now(), '%H%i%s'), #{userData.useract} ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE OWNERKY = #{param.ownerky}, SKUGRKY = #{param.skugrky}, ADDCOKY = #{param.addcoky}, SKUDESC = #{param.skudesc}, ITEMCOD = #{param.itemcod}, SKUWEIG = #{param.skuweig}, SKUWIDT = #{param.skuwidt}, SKULENG = #{param.skuleng}, SKUTHIC = #{param.skuthic}, SUOMKEY = #{param.suomkey}, SKUSTAT = #{param.skustat}, LMODATE = date_format(now(), '%Y%m%d'), LMOTIME = date_format(now(), '%H%i%s'), LMOUSER = #{userData.useract}, UPDTCHK = UPDTCHK + 1
